entries.title: Magic Girl, Neko, and the Gummy-Worm Moon
entries.summary: Magic Girl and Neko enter Otherworld and use surprising magic plus a rainbow of gummy worms to turn its square, crumb-dropping moon round again.
essentials: Magic Girl’s imperfect magic is useful
the friends solve the moon problem together

entries.title: Luna’s Very Important Stick Garden
entries.summary: Luna, a black stick-loving puppy, helps Moss the elk find a polite path to clover and discovers mushrooms decorating her pretend stick garden.
essentials: Luna normally patrols the farm garden

entries.title: Heidi and the Ravens’ Muddy Masterpiece
entries.summary: Old dog Heidi helps ravens Pepper and Pickle reach a very spoonish blue spoon, and an accidental splash becomes a temporary muddy masterpiece.
essentials: Pepper and Pickle collect shiny objects
their mud art washes gently back into the earth

entries.title: Neko and the Great Gummy-Worm Parade
entries.summary: Neko drives Magic Girl through a wacky Otherworld parade route to hand out gummy worms, help a snail band, and persuade an upside-down bridge to flip.
essentials: the candy comes from Neko’s clean magical rear drawer
Magic Girl hands treats to everyone

entries.title: Elsa’s Wacky Wand Concert
entries.summary: In an unofficial fan-story, Elsa visits Otherworld, sings a new kindness song, and gives children magic wands that make harmless silly surprises.
essentials: wand magic requires kindness and permission
Neko briefly grows a fluffy moustache
